page: Microsoft Azure HB368-96rs_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the HBv5 server family. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 448.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 4.67 GB of memory per core.

This server configuration includes 15851 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable. For high-performance networking, the server is RDMA capable, facilitating low-latency, high-throughput interconnectivity. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high-capacity local storage and dedicated compute resources, this server is designed for storage-intensive workloads, database management, and high-performance computing tasks that benefit from RDMA. The hardware profile offers a high density of local storage relative to the dedicated CPU allocation, providing qualitative cost efficiency for data-heavy operations without requiring external storage attachments.
description: Microsoft Azure HB368-96rs_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server within the HBv5 family, featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It is equipped with 448.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.67 GB per core, and includes a substantial 15851 GB of local storage. The server is RDMA capable and Premium Storage capable, making it highly suitable for high-performance computing and storage-intensive workloads. It does not feature any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is optimized for large-scale database operations, high-throughput data processing, and distributed workloads requiring low-latency node communication. The dedicated CPU allocation and massive local storage capacity deliver high resource density, making it a robust option for data-intensive deployments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure HB368-96rs_v5 is an x86_64 server with 96 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 448 GB RAM, and 15851 GB local storage. It is RDMA and Premium Storage capable for high-performance database workloads.

tagline: High-capacity local storage and dedicated Intel compute resources with RDMA capability for demanding database and high-performance workloads.
